case_title: RITTER PHILIP P TRUSTEE VS SMITH BARNEY INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY RITTER PHILIP P TRUSTEE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH BARNEY INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-1990 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00
